CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing (Motions)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Harry L Jacobs; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:22 am and concluding at 9:29 am.

Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company is represented by Julie Beaton, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Nathan Seastruck not appearing.

LOGAN SAHURI and RICHARD KNAPP, Esq. are sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testify.

Plaintiff's Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b) was filed on 8/23/2023.

Declaration of Plaintiff LOGAN SAHURI in Support of Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b) is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

Declaration of Plaintiff RICHARD KNAPP, Esq. in Support of Ex Parte Application for Waiver of Witness Requirement and Permission to Proceed by Declaration Pursuant to San Francisco County Superior Court Local Rule 6.6(D)(7)(b) is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company, and against Defendant Nathan Seastruck, as follows:

Declaratory relief:
1. For judgment against Defendant NATHAN MORRIS SEASTRUNK declaring that his failure to provide a recorded statement, failure to provide claim-related information and documentation requested on behalf of STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ("STATE FARM MUTUAL") during the examination under oath process, failure to executed under penalty of perjury and return the transcript from his examination under oath, and by misrepresenting and concealing information material to his claims, constituted material breaches of the relevant terms and conditions of STATE FARM MUTUAL policy no. 4569-445-0SA;

2. For judgment against Defemdant NATHAN MORRIS SEAS TRUNK declaring that no rights, duties or obligations arose or exist or may in the future arise or exist under and by virtue of the provisions of STATE FARM MUTUAL policy no. 4569-445-0SA with respect to any claim for benefits and/or coverage under STATE FARM MUTUAL policy no. 4569-445-0SA, including claims for Physical Damages Coverage and/or Uninsured/Underinsured Motor Vehicle Coverage, that have arisen or may arise as a result of the alleged November 15, 2020 accident.

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
